label: Transparent taiga canopy motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Taiga transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a taiga canopy motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete landscape subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: a compact layered boreal forest canopy cluster seen slightly from above, with spruce and fir crowns, dark evergreen needles, snow-blue frost tucked on upper boughs, bark-brown trunks and branch structure visible through the canopy, a few lichen-gray accents, and deep cold forest shadow. The identity must read as taiga canopy / boreal forest infrastructure, not tropical jungle, deciduous woodland, generic pine cone, mountain panorama, or Christmas decoration.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include an integrated canopy mass with varied conifer heights, vertical trunk rhythm, snow-blue highlights, and a strong silhouette suitable for catalog motif use. Clean studio lighting that preserves needle, snow, and bark detail. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no animals, no cabins, no people, no road, no lake, no sky, no text, no watermark, no ornaments, no single tree icon, no mountain backdrop, no loose pinecones.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Taiga light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Taiga", derived from a taiga canopy motif. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible deep infrastructure system.
Canvas: exact 16:9 horizontal 3840x2160 4K-class board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, deep infrastructure system mood. Use large legible labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Taiga, Taiga Canopy, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Infrastructure Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from layered boreal spruce canopy, dark spruce green needles, snow-blue frost on boughs, bark-brown trunks, lichen gray, cold forest shadow, vertical trunk rhythm, and map-like canopy layers. The board must read as taiga canopy / boreal forest, not tropical jungle, generic green SaaS, mountain resort, Christmas, or blue-only cloud dashboard.
Typography: English infrastructure UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use bilingual labels for node health, pipeline status, service inventory, incident routing, and capacity metrics with stable tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, service tiles, node health cards, pipeline summary, table rows, incident queue, command search palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, topology graph, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, filters, status chips, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow, needle texture samples, bark-ring texture samples, simple infrastructure icons, theme token swatches.
Style: deep infrastructure system, precise 8px grid and 8px card radius, snow-blue background surfaces, spruce-green primary actions and navigation, bark-brown dividers, lichen-gray muted controls, dark canopy ink text, thin trunk-like separators, subtle frost and needle textures, dense but scannable operational dashboards, polished shadcn/tweakcn component language.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no neon colors, no beige-only palette, no tropical leaves, no Christmas ornament identity, no mountain tourism poster, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Taiga", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Taiga dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Taiga" / "Taiga Canopy". Translate the same light design-system language into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas: exact 16:9 horizontal 3840x2160 4K-class board, clean professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation, deep infrastructure system mood. Keep labels large and legible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Taiga, Taiga Canopy, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Infrastructure Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve dark spruce-green primary actions, snow-blue focus and data highlights, bark-brown panel structure and borders, lichen-gray muted controls, frost texture, needle texture, vertical trunk separators, topology graph language, service health dashboards, incident queues, node cards, command search, status chips, and an 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. The board must read as taiga canopy / boreal forest infrastructure, not generic black-and-green terminal, tropical jungle, mountain resort, Christmas, or blue-only cloud dashboard.
Typography: English infrastructure UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use bilingual labels for node health, pipeline status, service inventory, incident routing, and capacity metrics with stable tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, service cards, node metrics, pipeline summary, incident table rows, line chart, bar chart, topology graph, sidebar navigation, command search palette, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets, infrastructure icon set.
Visual details: deep canopy-black background, conifer-shadow panels, snow-blue foreground text and rings, spruce-green active states, bark-brown separators, lichen-gray secondary surfaces, frost-edged chart highlights, subtle needle and bark texture overlays, thin trunk-line separators, restrained contrast, crisp controls and dashboards.
Constraints: no neon hacker UI, no pure black flat background, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no tropical leaves, no Christmas ornament identity, no mountain tourism poster, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Taiga", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
